subcodes.first_line: My Most Exalted Pen beareth witness unto the people of Bahá that there is none other God but Me, the All-Subduing, the Self-Subsisting. God hath, verily, heard the call of [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد قلمی الاعلی لاهل البهاء انه لا اله الا انا المهیمن القیوم قد سمع الله ندآء من
subcodes.subjects: @knowledge; recognition of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @praise and encouragement, @justice and wrath of God, @self-description of God; God's self-remembrance
